query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bonus_pools (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  pool_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  pool_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'founding_member',
  source_percentage DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 15.00,
  source_description VARCHAR(255),
  current_balance DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  total_accumulated DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  total_distributed DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  distribution_frequency VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'quarterly',
  last_distribution_date BIGINT,
  next_distribution_date BIGINT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  updated_at BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS founding_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  member_number INT NOT NULL,
  joined_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  updated_at BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bonus_distributions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  pool_id INT NOT NULL,
  distribution_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  period_start BIGINT NOT NULL,
  period_end BIGINT NOT NULL,
  total_revenue_base DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  pool_contribution DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  total_distributed DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  eligible_members INT NOT NULL,
  per_member_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  distribution_method VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'equal',
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
  approved_by INT,
  approved_at BIGINT,
  blockchain_hash VARCHAR(64),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS member_bonus_payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  distribution_id INT NOT NULL,
  founding_member_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  payment_method VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'check',
  payment_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
  payment_reference VARCHAR(100),
  paid_at BIGINT,
  blockchain_hash VARCHAR(64),
  created_at BIGINT DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);
